data.name: Voluptuous Fantasy
data.detailed_description:
From the southern kingdom, a selfish act spread violence to the north. A giantess and three girls rose to protect everyone from a mysterious wrath. Uncovering secrets in dungeons, passages, and towns. Plus, they got nice bodies.

ABOUT

Voluptuous Fantasy is a fetish game that takes place in a magical, medieval world. Dungeons filled with curvy monster girls are scattered around the lands and explored by a group of girls. These girls overcome dangerous situations by increasing their strength, sometimes that means gaining a bit of weight every now and then.

FEATURES

  • Cute girls who gain weight

  • Body expansions

  • 2 IRL weight gainers and 1 IRL VTuber

  • 100+ monster girls

  • Dungeon exploration

  • Card based battling system

  • Hand drawn art

  • A variety of activities like races and massages

  • An interesting and fun story

  • Nudity and sexual content

Weight Gainers and VTuber

Zee, Chonkopus, Gwen

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 16:9 Aspect Ratio or wider

建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
